goals.title: Bootstrap & install
goals.objective: npm install runs clean, npm test passes vitest (mocked provider), npm run typecheck passes, .env loads via dotenv
goals.evidence: npm install: added 66 pkgs, 0 vulns. npm run typecheck: tsc --noEmit clean (only ★ info-level generateObject deprecation, deferred to G003). npm test: vitest 4.1.7 — 2 files, 5/5 passed in 25ms (tests/trace.test.ts + tests/shadow.test.ts cover JSONL write, deterministic hashing, log-only AI source, prefer-shadow swap, non-divergence equals). .env present at autofunction/.env loaded via dotenv/config in src/cli/traces.ts and examples/detectTheme.ts. Commits 7727b7f (scaffold) + 147f4f0 (ultragoal plan) on origin/main.

goals.title: AI primitive smoke
goals.objective: Live round-trip via OpenClaw gateway succeeds for autoFunction with Haiku and Sonnet; trace JSONL contains ok=true row
goals.evidence: Provider pivoted to claude -p subprocess per user direction (OpenClaw :18789 is control UI, not OpenAI-compat). examples/smoke.ts ran end-to-end: Haiku output=pong 9.8s $0.20 traceId d62dda26 ok=true; Sonnet output=pong 7.9s $0.15 traceId 2e2689f8 ok=true. Both rows in traces/2026-05-26.jsonl with ok:true. tsc --noEmit clean; vitest 5/5 still passing. Cost is initialization-heavy (~$0.35 for first 2 calls due to 157k-token cache_creation_input_tokens), subsequent calls should drop to cache_read pricing.

goals.title: Schema-validated outputs
goals.objective: autoFunction with zod schema returns typed objects; malformed-output test asserts thrown error path is traced (ok=false)
goals.evidence: Live schema round-trip: examples/detectTheme.ts on Haiku with z.object({theme: z.enum(...), confidence: z.number()}) returned typed output {theme:"tech",confidence:0.98} in 10.6s, $0.20, traceId 33cbbf51. Schema embedded in prompt text (dropped --json-schema CLI flag because it injects an Anthropic Tool with strict input_schema.type requirement that broke; zod-to-json-schema produces $ref/definitions wrapper incompatible with tool format). Robustness via extractJson() parser pulls JSON from prose if model wraps. Unit tests: tests/autoFunction.test.ts adds 4 vi.mock-backed cases — text output, schema parse OK, schema violation throws ZodError + traces ok=false, claude -p is_error=true throws + traces ok=false. vitest 9/9 passing in 60ms. typecheck clean.

goals.title: Shadow-release wrapper
goals.objective: withShadow runs AI + code shadow in parallel, log-only mode returns AI output and flags divergence, prefer-shadow returns code output, paired trace ids linked
goals.evidence: Live shadow run: examples/shadow-demo.ts executed withShadow(detectThemeAI, detectThemeKeywordShadow, {mode:"log-only"}) on GPU/Linux/AI input. AI returned {theme:"tech",confidence:0.98} traceId 3c77132d, keyword-shadow returned {theme:"tech",confidence:0.9} traceId ca44e19c, source="ai", diverged=false (equals on theme matched). JSONL paired ids verified: AI event has id 3c77132d, shadow-code event has meta.pairedAiTraceId=3c77132d. Unit tests in tests/shadow.test.ts: 3 cases — log-only returns AI output and flags divergence on mismatched code shadow, prefer-shadow swaps source/output to shadow, equals callback marks non-diverged when shapes match. vitest 9/9 passing.

goals.title: Multi-tier eval harness
goals.objective: evalSet runs N cases through cheap+smart tiers, per-tier matchRate + avgLatencyMs reported, eval row written to JSONL
goals.evidence: Live eval: examples/eval-demo.ts ran 3 cases (politics/sports/finance) × 2 tiers (cheap/smart) = 6 calls. Haiku matchRate=1.0 avgLatency 10.4s; Sonnet matchRate=1.0 avgLatency 7.6s. perTier report written to JSONL as shadow-eval row id a2bf3914 with full {n, avgLatencyMs, matchRate} per tier. rows: 6 individual case×tier results returned + 1 aggregated shadow-eval trace event. Both tiers achieved 100% on this baseline set — meaningful matchRate deltas expected on harder/adversarial sets in G007 autoresearch loop.

goals.title: DuckDB observability
goals.objective: npm run traces:query summarises traces by fn+variant+tier with avg latency and error count; runs against real traces from prior stories
goals.evidence: npm run traces:query (src/cli/traces.ts + src/db.ts DuckDB :memory: + read_json_auto over traces/*.jsonl) produced grouped table: 12 events across 6 groups by fn+variant+tier — detectTheme cheap-ai n=6 avgLat 9.5s errors=1 (the early G003 --json-schema 400 error is captured, proving ok=false tracing works), detectTheme smart-ai n=3 avgLat 7.6s errors=0, detectTheme shadow-code n=1 11.3s, detectTheme shadow-eval n=1, smoke cheap-ai n=1 9.8s, smoke smart-ai n=1 7.9s. Fixed src/db.ts to read AUTOFN_TRACES_DIR per-call (was capturing at module load). DuckDB BigInt formatting (6n vs 6) is cosmetic; DuckDB returns COUNT as BigInt by default. Cross-story aggregation works end-to-end against real G002..G005 traces.

goals.title: Autoresearch loop
goals.objective: end-to-end demo where Claude reads detectTheme traces, proposes an improved prompt or shadow-code change, opens a PR with eval evidence (Haiku tier matchRate improves vs baseline)
goals.evidence: G007 autoresearch loop end-to-end on claude-haiku-4-5 regulator-action set: baseline matchRate 0.00 (0/4) → V2 frame-disambiguation prompt matchRate 0.25 (1/4), Δ +0.25 (n=4 anecdotal caveat in docs/Autoresearch.md). PR https://github.com/adelin-b/autofunction/pull/1.

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-bootstrap-install Bootstrap & install; G002-ai-primitive-smoke AI primitive smoke; G003-schema-validated-outputs Schema-validated outputs; G004-shadow-release-wrapper Shadow-release wrapper; G005-multi-tier-eval-harness Multi-tier eval harness; G006-duckdb-observability DuckDB observability; G007-autoresearch-loop Autoresearch loop
